Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS LOCAL 87, AHMED ABOZAYD, OLGA MIRANDA and SEIU'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

SEIU Local 87, Olga Miranda and Ahmed Abozayd's unopposed motion to compel arbitration and stay action is granted.

Order signed.
